title: Craftmine Improved Wand Textures
description: A simple texture pack that changes the wand textures in Craftmine.
body:
This texturepack currently only changes the wands in craftmine, but may change more in the future.![The retextured wands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae7a4722471d1a9142923878c80838b8e7f5cc32.png)
  The retextured wands with fire on the left wind on the right and teleportation in the middle
